summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise technology experience and strong financial-services background. Deep experience building SQL/Python data pipelines, data models, data quality controls, reporting datasets, and operational analytics platforms in regulated banking environments. Hands-on background with Spark/PySpark, AWS data services, Oracle/SQL, data warehousing, and stakeholder-facing analytics delivery; currently expanding modern platform skills across Snowflake, dbt, and lakehouse patterns.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and operated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry and infrastructure data from 6,000+ endpoints, producing trusted datasets for forecasting, reporting, and operational decision-making.
Built and optimized Oracle schemas, historical retention models, and SQL reporting layers that supported capacity planning, executive reporting, and financial-services technology operations.
Implemented data quality, validation, reconciliation, and monitoring practices to improve reliability of recurring reporting cycles and reduce manual data preparation effort.
Developed Python-based forecasting and analytics workflows using Prophet, scikit-learn, pandas, and visualization libraries to support infrastructure risk analysis and leadership-facing insights.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform patterns using S3, AWS Glue, Redshift, and Python ETL concepts to support scalable cloud-based data processing and reporting workloads.
Collaborated with architecture, operations, analytics, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into maintainable datasets, documented processes, and production-ready reporting outputs.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring data used to analyze customer-facing system performance, reliability, and business impact.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance datasets to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Created analytics and reporting outputs using monitoring, QLIK, Oracle, PostgreSQL, and performance test data to support stakeholder decision-making.
Partnered with engineering and operations teams during AWS migration planning, providing data-driven readiness and performance insights.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as senior APM and performance engineering consultant in a financial-services environment, supporting large-scale monitoring, reporting, and operational analytics needs.
Built Perl/Korn Shell data extraction and reporting automation to replace manual weekly exports and improve consistency of performance reporting.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, SLA views, and technical documentation adopted across client environments.
Collaborated with WebLogic, WebSphere, Oracle, and J2EE teams to investigate performance issues and communicate root-cause findings to technical stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, validating correctness and preserving low-latency transaction performance.
Designed automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to support phased migration cutover and data integrity across millions of records.
Optimized SQL, C++/OCCI, and Oracle data access patterns to reduce hardware footprint while maintaining production service performance.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PySpark, PL/SQL, Java, Perl, Korn Shell, XML, JSON
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data ingestion, transformation logic, data marts, data warehousing, reporting datasets, metadata documentation, data flow documentation
skills.Big Data & Cloud: Apache Spark, PySpark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Amazon Redshift, cloud data platform concepts
skills.Data Modeling & Quality: Dimensional modeling, schema design, data validation, reconciliation, data quality controls, performance tuning, historical data retention, reporting layer design
skills.Financial Services & Governance: Regulated banking environments, data governance, access controls, audit-aware documentation, operational reporting, risk and capacity analytics
skills.Analytics & Reporting: Executive reporting, stakeholder analytics, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, QLIK, dashboard data preparation
skills.Delivery & Reliability: Git, GitHub workflows, CI/CD concepts, Agile/Scrum, production support, monitoring, logging, incident troubleshooting, runbooks, technical documentation
skills.Developing Knowledge: Snowflake, dbt, Databricks, Delta Lake, medallion architecture, Data Vault concepts

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into trusted planning datasets, executive dashboards, and capacity risk insights for a banking-scale environment.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed AWS data platform patterns using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark concepts to support scalable ETL, analytics-ready datasets, and GenAI/Text-to-SQL exploration.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an agentic Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-based scoring and tailoring, JSON quality gates, and application tracking, demonstrating production-style AI workflow orchestration and data validation.
